program.name: Usage Invoice Calculator
intake.purpose: Calculate a deterministic monthly usage invoice from plan and event volume.
intake.stages_json: [{"slug":"intake","is_bootstrap":true},{"slug":"calculate_invoice","domain_spec":{"reads":["inputs.initial_user_text.plan","inputs.initial_user_text.usage_events","runtime.now"],"produces":{"result_json":{"stage":"string","plan":"string","usage_events":"number","included_events":"number","overage_events":"number","base_cents":"number","overage_rate_cents":"number","overage_cents":"number","total_cents":"number","currency":"USD","billed_at":"ISO timestamp string"},"items_json":["plan:<plan>","overage_events:<overage_events>","total_cents:<total_cents>"]},"rules":["Parse input.domain[\"inputs.initial_user_text\"] as JSON.","Use pricing by plan: starter has base_cents 2500, included_events 1000, overage_rate_cents 3; growth has base_cents 8000, included_events 5000, overage_rate_cents 2; scale has base_cents 20000, included_events 20000, overage_rate_cents 1.","overage_events = Math.max(0, usage_events - included_events).","overage_cents = overage_events * overage_rate_cents.","total_cents = base_cents + overage_cents.","currency is USD and billed_at is runtime.now()."],"invariants":["result_json.stage must equal calculate_invoice.","plan and usage_events must be echoed from the parsed request.","items_json must be exactly [\"plan:<plan>\", \"overage_events:<overage_events>\", \"total_cents:<total_cents>\"] using computed values."]}},{"slug":"complete","is_terminal":true}]
